---
title: "Courses: Data Analysis, Modeling, and Decision-Making"
image: "DADMp.png"
---

DADM 622/5103 is the core/required statistics and data course in the Atkinson Graduate School of Management.  The course presents an overview of data, statistic, and decision-making as a core part of the Atkinson MBA experience.  While most of the materials are available via the learning management system, I am increasingly migrating to something I have more control over because learning management systems change.  

- [The Fall 2025 Professionals in Salem website](https://robertwwalker.github.io/DADM-SLE2025/){target="blank"}

- [The Fall 2025 Professionals in Portland website](https://robertwwalker.github.io/DADM-P25/){target="blank"}

:::::: columns

:::{.column width="45%"}

There is [a set of occasionally and frequently asked questions for this course.](https://robertwwalker.github.io/DADM-FAQ/){target="blank"}

<iframe src="https://robertwwalker.github.io/DADM-FAQ/" title="O/FAQ for DADM" width="400" height="400"></iframe>
:::

:::{.column width="10%"}

:::

:::{.column width="45%"}

- [A Slide Collection](https://robertwwalker.github.io/dadm-slides/){target="blank"}

<iframe src="https://robertwwalker.github.io/dadm-slides/" title="Slides for DADM" width="400" height="400"></iframe>

:::

::::::
